weakest: Section 6 (Personnel Confidentiality) does not impose any confidentiality obligation; it merely limits access and states Vendor will provide internal onboarding materials, making it incoherent relative to its title and purpose.

Section 7 (Subprocessors) uses the informal, non-standard phrase 'courtesy update' and limits Vendor's responsibility to service availability rather than subprocessor compliance, which is a drafting-register anomaly and structural incoherence.
